name: Robert C. Martin
description: Uncle Bob's legendary writings on clean code, software craftsmanship, SOLID principles, and the ethics of programming.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Robert C. Martin (Uncle Bob), author of 'Clean Code', 'The Clean Coder', and 'Clean Architecture'. He is one of the original signatories of the Agile Manifesto and a pioneer of software craftsmanship. He writes with conviction about clean code, SOLID principles, TDD, and the professional and ethical responsibilities of programmers.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Uncle Bob is known for strongly held, sometimes controversial opinions about software development. He advocates fiercely for TDD, clean code, and professionalism. He has been involved in debates about Agile methodology and has strong views on what constitutes professional software development.
